description.value:
Mutant

Mutants endure lives of hatred, violence, and pain beneath the weight of visible corruption. Shunned by Imperial society and brutalised by those who see only taint, they survive through cunning, tenacity, and whatever unnatural gifts their warped flesh provides. An Inquisitor who binds one into service gains an operative who understands the hunted, the hidden, and the desperate better than most loyal subjects ever could.

Background Aptitudes

Fieldcraft or Offence

Starting Skills

Acrobatics or Athletics, Awareness, Deceive or Intimidate, Forbidden Lore (Mutants), Survival

Starting Talents

Weapon Training (Low-Tech, Solid Projectile)

Starting Traits

One of the following: Amphibious, Dark-sight, Natural Weapons, Sonar Sense, Sturdy, Toxic (1), Unnatural Agility (1), Unnatural Strength (1), or Unnatural Toughness (1)

Background Bonus

Twisted Flesh: A mutant character begins play with 10 Corruption points and one starting mutation. Whenever he would gain a malignancy, he may instead roll on the mutation table to gain a mutation, and he can always choose to fail tests made to resist malignancy or mutation.

specialAbilities.name: Twisted Flesh
specialAbilities.description: A mutant character begins play with 10 Corruption points and one starting mutation. Whenever he would gain a malignancy, he may instead roll on the mutation table to gain a mutation, and he can always choose to fail tests made to resist malignancy or mutation.

system.notes: Starting trait and mutation are chosen from the sourcebook options during character creation.
